name: Noordenveld (Netherlands)

colors.symbolism: the upper band and the clover

description: A green-over-yellow horizontal bicolour bearing a large green clover (trefoil) at the centre, with a black-and-white checkered band at the hoist.
history: Flag of the municipality of Noordenveld in the north-west of the province of Drenthe, formed in the 1998 reorganisation of the province's municipalities.

features.role: a black-and-white checkered band at the hoist
